name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: PLS Check Cashers is a 24/7 financial services chain offering check cashing, money orders, bill pay, Ria money transfers, and vehicle registration across 12 states.
description_long:
PLS Financial Services, Inc. operates the PLS Check Cashers chain under the consumer-facing brand 'PLS 247,' reflecting its around-the-clock operating model. The company runs locations across 12 states — Arizona, California, Illinois, Indiana, Kentucky, Massachusetts, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Oklahoma, Texas, and Wisconsin. The Chicago location at 4400 W. Armitage Ave. exemplifies the chain's approach: a full-service financial center positioned in urban, working-class neighborhoods where access to traditional banking may be limited or inconvenient. Illinois locations operate as Community Currency Exchanges, a state-licensed designation that authorizes an expanded range of government and financial services.

PLS Check Cashers provides a wide range of money services under one roof. Core financial offerings include check cashing, money orders, bill payment, government benefits processing, and foreign currency exchange. International and domestic money transfers are available through Ria Money Transfer, a major global remittance network. For customers without bank accounts, PLS offers the Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard — a prepaid debit card with a companion mobile app for managing funds electronically. Illinois PLS locations also handle vehicle registration and renewals, title transfers, license plates, city stickers, and transit cards — services otherwise requiring a trip to a government office.

The 24/7 availability across all service categories is a genuine differentiator. Most banks, credit unions, and payday lenders operate standard business hours, but PLS locations are open around the clock — including for DMV-adjacent services and notary work. On-site ATMs, notary services for wills, deeds, trusts, and power of attorney documents, fax and copy services, phone top-ups, and coin and cash exchange further extend the utility of a single store visit. The Ria Money Transfer partnership provides a regulated, established channel for international remittances, which is meaningful for immigrant communities in underserved urban markets.

PLS Check Cashers fills a real gap for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need immediate access to cash or government services outside banking hours. The combination of financial services and state transportation services under one roof is unusual in this industry and adds genuine utility. That said, check cashing services typically charge fees of 1% to 5% or more per check, and PLS does not publish its fee schedule on its website — customers must visit a location or call to learn current rates. For consumers with a bank account, accessing funds through a bank or credit union will almost always be less expensive. PLS is best understood as a high-access convenience service, not a cost-effective alternative to traditional banking.
address: 2317 N Pennsylvania Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73107

company_info.headquarters: 2317 N Pennsylvania Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73107

pros: Open 24/7 for all service categories — check cashing, bill pay, money transfers, and DMV services alike
Illinois locations handle vehicle registration, title transfers, license plates, and city stickers — rare for a check casher
Ria Money Transfer available for regulated international and domestic remittances
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard gives unbanked customers a prepaid card with a mobile app
On-site notary services for wills, deeds, trusts, and power of attorney documents
Foreign currency exchange available at check-cashing locations
ATMs, fax/copy, phone top-ups, and coin/cash exchange services in a single visit
cons: Fee schedule is not published on the website — customers must call or visit to get current check cashing rates
Check cashing fees are typically higher than accessing the same funds through a bank account
No savings, credit-building, lending, or insurance products offered
Xpectations! prepaid card likely carries maintenance or transaction fees that are not disclosed on the site
Service availability varies by location — not every service listed is guaranteed at every store
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need to cash checks immediately without a bank account
Illinois residents needing vehicle registration, title transfers, or license plate renewals outside government office hours
Immigrant workers and others sending international remittances who need a regulated, in-person money transfer service
Shift workers or gig workers needing financial services — including notary or bill pay — outside standard business hours
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need immediate check cashing, bill payment, or money transfers — particularly outside normal business hours. Illinois residents gain added value from on-site vehicle registration and title transfer services not typically available at check cashers. The main caveat is cost: fees are not disclosed online and check cashing is generally more expensive than using a bank account or credit union.
services: Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard with mobile app
